text_block_list.name: Popular Idol
text_block_list.text: Three! Two! One! Happy New Year!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Happy New Year!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Pheeew!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Wow! That was a fantastic New Year's Eve
concert!

Today, Smart Falcon has brought me along to
ring in the new year at a popular idol's concert.

While the concert itself was nothing short of
fantastic, staying out all night has taken its toll
on me. Smart Falcon, on the other hand, seems to
have grown even more energized by the
experience.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: She really packed that concert full of everything that makes her popular, don't you think?!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Her singing and dancing were on a whole
different level! She stole my heart and I'll never
get it back!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I want to become an Umadol who people want to
spend their New Year's with too!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: No, I will become that kind of Umadol! ☆ This year, I'm gonna sing and dance with everything I've got! ♪

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: That goes without saying!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
My resolution this year is the same as every other
year—to become a top Umadol!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna keep on winning, taking center stage,
and shining eeeven brighter! ☆

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Oh, I know!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I'm feeling super pumped from the concert
earlier, so why don't we do idol stuff all day?! ☆

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Let's figure out exactly what it is that makes idols
shine! And to do that...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Should we go to more concerts? Or should we do
some visualization training? Or how about some
research?

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: What do you think?

...They all sound rough after the all-nighter we
pulled, but it's not like I can just ignore her
enthusiasm. I'll have to go with...
choice_data_list:
Concerts! Let's turn this outing into an idol
marathon!

Sleep! You can practice for the idol life in your
dreams!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
That's the spirit, Trainer! I like your attitude and
I'm with you! ♪

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Let's see what concerts are on today with tickets
left! ☆

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: I'm all fired up! Let's go!

After that, we go watch any and all New Year's
concerts we can find.

We end up pulling a magnificent
twenty-four-hour concert marathon!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Phewww! ♪ All right, Trainer, let's head to the
next one!
...Twenty-four hours and counting, it seems.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: ...What?! Sleep?!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: You can do visualization training while you sleep?
choice_data_list:
An Umadol must train even their subconscious
mind!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I-I don't get it entirely, but I think you might be
on to something!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Got it! I'll become the perfect Umadol in my
dreams!
And so, I'm able to spend a restful New Year...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Great idea! ♪ How about we go to a karaoke
room?

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I've saved a ton of idol videos we can use for
reference!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
They let you play videos and rent DVDs at
karaoke. I can tell you all about my favorite idols!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
See this group? They're known for being
technical, so they're all great at singing! I think
there's a lot I can learn from them! For example...

After that, we head to a place where we can play
videos and I enjoy Idols 101 with Professor Falco.
